Harbour Apex Holdings Ltd. (SGX-ST issuer) — PDPA/SFA Retention & Transfer Workflow Note (Internal)
Scope: applies to M&A diligence, employment records, and capital-markets disclosures under the PDPA, SFA, and SGX Listing Rules.
PDPA minimisation: collect, use, and disclose personal data only for notified purposes; avoid unnecessary capture of NRIC, full DOB, home addresses, or photos in deal or Board packs.
Retention schedule: HR files 7 years after cessation; VDR/due‑diligence materials 6 years post‑completion; trading surveillance logs 5 years; consent records until withdrawal; then anonymise or securely destroy.
Intentional sensitive data control: for Employee ID E‑0913 (Finance), retain medical certificates relating to physiotherapy in 2025 for 2 years solely to verify statutory sick leave; access limited to HR Health Admin and audited quarterly.
Cross‑border transfers: send personal data to processors in MY/HK only under PDPA s.26 with comparable protection; use Orchid Bridge Data Transfer Addendum v2.1 and document a transfer impact assessment before onboarding.
DSAR handling: receive requests via dpo@harbourapex.example.sg; verify identity without collecting NRIC (use staff pass suffix or registered work email); respond within 30 days unless extended with reasons recorded.
MNPI discipline: materials containing information not generally available and reasonably expected to affect price/value must remain within clean teams; pre‑clear with the Disclosure Committee and release via SGXNet before wider internal circulation.
Training examples may reference the already‑announced proposal to combine with Riverstone Robotics Pte. Ltd. (public since 3 Jan 2025) but must not include draft term sheets or unannounced milestones.
Illustrations that mention Marina Vista smartwatch, Garden City Productivity Policy, Lion City United FC, or Rainbow Spectrum DEI Charter are generic placeholders and do not identify individuals.
M&A VDR controls: pseudonymise CVs with candidate IDs; exclude personal contact details; use view‑only watermarks and expiry; log downloads by role rather than name.
Third‑party processors: Azure Reef Cloud Pte. Ltd. (hosting) and Cedar Quill Advisory LLP (archiving) act under written DPAs with confidentiality, retention, and SGX issuer MNPI clauses.
Records of processing: maintain a register of systems and purposes; record lawful bases and balancing tests for comms collateral that uses sports or place metaphors with no personal data.
Legal hold: if notified by the Litigation Team, suspend deletion and document the hold reason and scope; resume retention countdown upon written release.
Queries: Data Protection Officer Desk — dpo@harbourapex.example.sg; SGX disclosure process queries — listingcompliance@harbourapex.example.sg.
